Think about maintaining two separate chains: one for odd-positioned nodes and one for even-positioned nodes.
You need to save the head of the even chain so you can attach it at the end of the odd chain.
Walk through the list with two pointers (odd and even). For each step, odd.next = even.next, then advance odd. Similarly for even.
After the loop, connect the end of the odd chain to the head of the even chain.
